player_notes.luka doncic: Out — seeking specialized treatment in Europe for Grade 2 left hamstring strain; targeting playoff return only. Significant usage vacuum for LAL teammates tonight vs OKC.
player_notes.austin reaves: Out — also targeting playoff return, not available vs OKC tonight. Further boosts role for LeBron and remaining LAL rotation players.
player_notes.stephen curry: Returned from injury Sunday, played 26 minutes and scored 29. Minute restriction in effect; monitor for similar cap tonight vs SAC.
player_notes.cade cunningham: Out — Pistons clinched East's top seed without him. Backup guards/wings see elevated usage vs ORL tonight.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Out — missed Spurs' win Thursday; monitor status for any SAS game tonight. Fox and others benefiting from expanded role.

game_notes.OKC vs LAL: Doncic and Reaves both out for LAL; LeBron James leads a short-handed roster, expect elevated usage for him and other LAL starters.
game_notes.DET vs ORL: Cade Cunningham out for DET; backup guards/wings in expanded roles — factor into DET player props.
game_notes.GSW vs SAC: Curry returned Sunday but played only 26 minutes under apparent restriction; limit confidence on his counting stat overs tonight.
